reviews.review_title: The game may look good, but the servers!
reviews.review_description: I first joined the game and I decided to see just to see every monster surrounding forest. I got to the thing what the guy said. I changed my name and tried to join a lobby so excited  just to realize the servers won't work, I know your gonna say "wait for the servers were fixing it be patient!!!" but I will dang

Thank you for unbanning me￼ and modder ￼can be stupid sometimes overall the game really really good ￼ and I really really like it. Also, please make it so the punch map has more monsters and also revamp it a little bit thank you Dev.￼￼￼

developer_response.body: Ty For Changing the review! Also Thanks alot for some ideas! have fun playing the game!

reviews.review_description: This game has tins if stuff as custom maps, a actual active owner who doesn't abuse power, good staff, and the game gets updates a lot, best gth of 2026 by far

it not the worst of a gth, defo not slop
its fun, yeah go check out, not much to say but if u want something new then check this out.

-Rat

reviews.review_title: A really good gth fan game
reviews.review_description: I played with the owner and Hes chill and the game has good monsters and maps
I think this game is real good
Cant even play or join codes

developer_response.body: just wait a bit servers are down at the moment.
